title: rule-categories-cli-and-api
description:
Implement CLI changes and guard API surface for rule categories. From docs/plans/06-rule-categories.md.

Sections: §4.8, §4.9, §4.10, §3.3

Key deliverables:
- Config YAML: destructive_policy/privacy_policy fields (remove old policy field)
- Test mode: --destructive-policy/--privacy-policy flags, --policy shorthand
- Hook output: buildReason with [category] prefix, explanation precedence (§3.3)
- Replace dcg-go packs command with dcg-go list command:
  - dcg-go list packs: per-category rule counts
  - dcg-go list rules: all rules grouped by category with pack name
  - Both support --json
- Updated guard.PackInfo with DestructiveCount/PrivacyCount/BothCount
- New guard.Rules() returning []RuleInfo
- Update main.go command routing and usage text
- Integration tests for dual-policy evaluation scenarios
- Tests for list command output, config parsing, hook output format

References:
- Plan: docs/plans/06-rule-categories.md §3.3, §4.8, §4.9, §4.10, §8 (Integration Tests)
- Depends on: dcg-ovc.1 (foundation), dcg-ovc.2 (rule tagging, for list command to show real categories)
